The company '''Morgath Industries'''{{'}} interests included [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] processing and [[Gene/Legends|genetic]] food additives. They were also a major supplier of [[Diet/Legends|dietary]] supplements and special preservatives to other food manufacturers. Morgath Industries was a [[contributing sponsor]] of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], having provided fifty trillion [[Credit chip/Legends|credits]] worth of equipment, funds, and services. This investment yielded a proportional share of [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] profits as well as nominal discounts on bulk goods and raw materials.<ref name="HSCS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Morgath Industries was mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' by [[Michael Allen Horne]], created for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="HSCS" />
